trigger.Name: Tollerance
trigger.script:
SetTolerance( 1100, 1031, RS_NEUTRAL ) SetTolerance( 1066, 1031, RS_NEUTRAL ) SetWeather(0)
CreateVehicleEx("CoolBelaz_3","Koch_1", CVector(2086.163, 650.301, 3861.111), 1064)
local vehKoch1 = GetEntityByName("Koch_1") if vehKoch1 then vehKoch1:SetPosition( CVector(2933.514, 650.070, 5080.042)) vehKoch1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.002, -0.868, 0.002, 0.497)) end
CreateNewDummyObject( "r2_high_voltage", "LEP1", -1, -1, CVector(1705.072, 517.357, 3751.646), Quaternion(0.0026, -0.4732, 0.3746, 0.7974),1 )
trigger:Deactivate()
